title: X-tra Adventurous American Burrata Tagine
description: A fusion of traditional American flavors with the exotic, aromatic spices of the Middle East, featuring creamy burrata cheese in a hearty, flavorful tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large, heavy-bottomed skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, dried apricots, pitted dates, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and salt.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the flavors have melded together and the apricots are slightly tender.
Add the burrata cheese to the skillet and stir gently to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese has melted and the mixture is heated through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over couscous for a filling meal.
Adjust the seasoning as needed and serve hot.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
